title: Native email integration with other providers then Gmail or Outlook
excerpt:
At the moment there is possible email integration with Gmail and Outlook. But no other providers which are many out there. That is a huge limitation for the monday.com platform. 
Because of that many users are not willin…

posts.author: Tomasz1 (Kowalski)
posts.cookedHtml:
At the moment there is possible email integration with Gmail and Outlook. But no other providers which are many out there. That is a huge limitation for the monday.com platform.

Because of that many users are not willing to use monday.com

Simple integration with IMAP accounts would be great and useful.
